title: Operate irrigation controller and sensor technology
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Operate irrigation controller and sensor technology demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for work

pcs.text: Confirm activity to be undertaken, including identifying potential hazards and risks and implementing safe working practices to manage risks
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm activity to be undertaken, including identifying potential hazards and risks and implementing safe working practices to manage risks?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm activity to be undertaken, including identifying potential hazards and risks and implementing safe working practices to manage risks.

pcs.text: Select required tools and equipment, and check for safe operation and accuracy
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select required tools and equipment, and check for safe operation and accuracy?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select required tools and equipment, and check for safe operation and accuracy.

pcs.text: Select, fit and use personal protective equipment applicable to the task
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, fit and use personal protective equipment applicable to the task?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, fit and use personal protective equipment applicable to the task.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare for work

elements.title: Operate irrigation controllers

pcs.text: Link valves to controllers by wiring or radio signals
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Link valves to controllers by wiring or radio signals?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Link valves to controllers by wiring or radio signals.

pcs.text: Program controllers according to operating procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Program controllers according to operating procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Program controllers according to operating procedures.

pcs.text: Operate controller according to site requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Operate controller according to site requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Operate controller according to site requirements.

pcs.text: Troubleshoot controller and rectify cause of faults
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Troubleshoot controller and rectify cause of faults?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Troubleshoot controller and rectify cause of faults.

elements.title: Operate irrigation sensors

pcs.text: Link sensors to controllers by wiring or radio signals
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Link sensors to controllers by wiring or radio signals?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Link sensors to controllers by wiring or radio signals.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Program controllers to monitor sensor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Program controllers to monitor sensor.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Operate and monitor accuracy and reliability of sensor control equipment, and adjust where necessary.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Collect samples according to sampling techniques?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Collect samples according to sampling techniques.

pcs.text: Record and interpret readings and observations
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record and interpret readings and observations?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record and interpret readings and observations.

pcs.text: Troubleshoot sensors and rectify cause of faults
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Troubleshoot sensors and rectify cause of faults?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Troubleshoot sensors and rectify cause of faults.

pcs.text: Report discrepancies or malfunctions to management
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Report discrepancies or malfunctions to management?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Report discrepancies or malfunctions to management.
